title: UserPreferences
description: Captures a user's application preferences published to the user-preferences Kafka topic.

theme.description: UI theme selected by the user (e.g., light, dark).

notifications_enabled.description: Whether the user has opted in to push notifications.

language.description: Preferred language code in BCP 47 format (e.g., en-US).

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier for the user (e.g., America/New_York). Optional; consumers must handle its absence.
